news.title: DeKalb DA's Office employee critically injured by July 4th celebratory gunfire; two arrested
news.summary: The DeKalb County DA's Office said Lakesha Davis was inside her own home when she was critically injured by the gunfire.

news.title: Police working to identify suspect linked to armed robbery, carjacking in Atlanta
news.summary: ​When they met up, the suspect flashed his gun at the victim and took his vehicle, according to police.

news.title: DeKalb DA employee critically hurt by celebratory gunfire, 2 arrested
news.summary: A woman was hospitalized after being struck by a stray bullet from "celebratory gunfire" inside her DeKalb County home Saturday night.

news.title: 1 person arrested after gunfire interrupts fireworks celebration in Avondale Estates, police say
news.summary: Attendees at the celebration were evacuated out of an abundance of caution, according to police, and were quickly escorted from the stadium.

news.title: Big Tigger steps away from radio show after arrest
news.summary: Atlanta radio host Darian Morgan, better known as Big Tigger, says he is stepping away from his radio show as he fights the battery and cruelty to children charges against him.

news.title: 32-year-old man shot Monday morning in DeKalb County, family says
news.summary: A man was reportedly hospitalized after a shooting Monday morning in DeKalb County, though police have not yet released details about the incident.

news.title: UPDATE: Critically missing 12-year-old in McDonough located, police say
news.summary: McDonough police are asking for the public's help to locate a 12-year-old boy who disappeared from his home.

news.title: Big Tigger leaving radio show after Sandy Springs arrest
news.summary: Atlanta radio host Big Tigger is stepping away from the microphone to focus on his family following his arrest on domestic violence charges.

news.title: Driver dies after flipping car on I-75 ramp during GSP pursuit
news.summary: A high-speed pursuit on Interstate 75 ended in a fatal rollover crash in Henry County early Sunday morning after a driver attempted to flee state law enforcement.
